config.title: Basic Configuration
config.subtitle: How will you access Yuvomi?
config.existing: Existing configuration detected — your current .env file will be backed up before saving.
config.hostHint: The address you'll use to open Yuvomi in your browser.
config.errHost: Invalid hostname. Use only letters, digits, hyphens and dots.
config.errPort: Invalid port. Must be a number between 1 and 65535.
config.prereqMissing: Missing prerequisites: {{list}}. Please install them and reload this page.

secrets.title: Security Keys
secrets.subtitle: These protect your session and encrypt the database. Store your .env file safely — losing these keys means losing access to your data.
secrets.dbHint: Encrypts the SQLite database at rest.

weather.title: Weather Widget
weather.subtitle: Live weather on the dashboard — free, no account, no API key.
weather.coordHint: Find coordinates on openstreetmap.org or Google Maps.

calendar.title: Calendar Sync
calendar.subtitle: Connect Yuvomi to Google Calendar or Apple iCloud. Both optional — expand to configure.
calendar.googleHint: Create OAuth credentials at {{link}}. Redirect URI: {{redirect}}
calendar.googleSelectNote: After connecting, you can choose which calendar to sync in the app settings (default: primary calendar).
calendar.appleUrlHint: Leave empty unless your provider uses a different CalDAV endpoint.

review.title: Review
review.subtitle: Check your settings before writing .env and starting the container.

docker.title: Starting Yuvomi
docker.subtitle: Pulling the image and starting the Docker container.

admin.title: Create Admin Account
admin.subtitle: Set up your first login. This account has full access to Yuvomi.
admin.errPass: Password must be at least 8 characters.

done.title: Yuvomi is ready!
done.subtitle: Your family planner is running and your admin account is set up.

advanced.title: Advanced Settings
advanced.subtitle: Reverse proxy, single sign-on and automatic backups. All optional — skipping is safe.
advanced.proxyBehindHttps: Behind a reverse proxy with HTTPS (Caddy, nginx, Traefik)
advanced.proxyHint: Direct access disables secure-only cookies so login works without HTTPS.
advanced.oidcHint: Fill in all four fields to enable SSO, or leave them empty.
advanced.errOidc: OIDC requires all four fields or none.
advanced.backupScheduleHint: When to run backups. Default: daily at 2 AM.
advanced.documentWebdavHint: Non-empty environment values override the corresponding settings stored in the database.
advanced.documentWebdavPathHint: Remote folder for document files. Leave empty to use yuvomi-documents.
